goal: Allow opt-in DeepSeek-native single-shot prompt execution to use the guarded FIM route before falling back to the normal agent loop.
tests: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=test cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- --deepseek-native --no-state --deepseek-fim-route --deepseek-fim-response '{"choices":[{"text":"//! prompt routed completion"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":5,"completion_tokens":2}}' --json --prompt 'complete src/deepseek.rs lines 2-3'
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: The guarded FIM route can work as a diagnostic command but prompt mode still always enters the normal agent loop, so ordinary local edits cannot opt into FIM without manually invoking a separate command.
